name: Recess Peanut Butter Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a cupcake liner with scissors to about 1 inch deep. Set in a cupcake baking pan.
2. Melt the chocolate bar in a pan on the stove.
3. Mix 1/2 cup of the peanut butter into the melted chocolate.
4. Melt the remaining peanut butter in a separate pan.
5. Pour about a tablespoon of the chocolate/Peanut Butter mixture into each cupcake holder.
6. Allow the mixture to set.
7. Add a tablespoon of pure Peanut Butter over the first layer.
8. Allow this to set.
9. Top off with another layer of the chocolate/Peanut Butter mixture.
